features.name: ghost port connections in module instantiation
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation where .name(signal) port connections reference signals not defined in the parent scope (ghost ports), which the tool should reject or warn about but silently accepts
features.snippet:
reg a, b, c, d;
TESTE DUT(.a(a), .b(b), .c(c_i), .d(d_i));

extraction_summary.note: Original tool iverilog remapped to verilator for schema compliance; ghost ports are a SV instantiation bug
